            <title><![CDATA[Israel says Netanyahu will meet with Trump in Washington on Wednesday about U.S.-Iran talks]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/israel-says-netanyahu-will-meet-with-trump-in-washington-on-wednesday-about-u-s-iran-talks</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will meet with U.S. President Donald Trump in Washington on Wednesday about American talks with Iran.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 18:43:47 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/israel-says-netanyahu-will-meet-with-trump-in-washington-on-wednesday-about-u-s-iran-talks</guid>

                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Polls open in Japan's parliamentary elections as Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi hopes for big win]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/polls-open-in-japans-parliamentary-elections-as-prime-minister-sanae-takaichi-hopes-for-big-win</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Polls opened Sunday in parliamentary elections that Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi hopes will give her struggling party a big enough win to push through an ambitious conservative political agenda.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 17:26:03 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/polls-open-in-japans-parliamentary-elections-as-prime-minister-sanae-takaichi-hopes-for-big-win</guid>

                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/parliamentary-election"><![CDATA[parliamentary election]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/sanae-takaichi"><![CDATA[Sanae Takaichi]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Mari Yamaguchi, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Foster Klug, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-07T220224Z_359032435_RC2SGJAS8PZS_RTRMADP_3_JAPAN-ELECTION-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[What to know about the kidnapping of Nancy Guthrie and the race to find her]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/what-to-know-about-the-kidnapping-of-nancy-guthrie-and-the-race-to-find-her</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Investigators have been examining ransom notes and looking for evidence but have not named a suspect in Nancy Guthrie's kidnapping.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 16:42:48 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/what-to-know-about-the-kidnapping-of-nancy-guthrie-and-the-race-to-find-her</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/arizona"><![CDATA[arizona]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/kidnapping"><![CDATA[kidnapping]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/nancy-guthrie"><![CDATA[nancy guthrie]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/savannah-guthrie"><![CDATA[savannah guthrie]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-05T173116Z_1841660547_RC2TFJAX140C_RTRMADP_3_USA-CRIME-GUTHRIE-1024x768.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="768" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Here's what to know about the constitutional right to record immigration agents in public]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/heres-what-to-know-about-the-constitutional-right-to-record-immigration-agents-in-public</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Recording on-duty immigration agents in public is a First Amendment right, but obstructing agents' work is a crime. Whether something constitutes as obstruction can be subjective. Here's what legal experts say you should know.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 15:40:50 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/heres-what-to-know-about-the-constitutional-right-to-record-immigration-agents-in-public</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/fact-checking"><![CDATA[fact checking]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/federal-agents"><![CDATA[federal agents]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/first-amendment-rights"><![CDATA[First Amendment rights]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/immigration"><![CDATA[immigration]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/politifact"><![CDATA[politifact]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Maria Ramirez Uribe, PolitiFact]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-05T215941Z_1444034692_RC2WFJAQXZR3_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-MINNESOTA-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Olympians and scientists explain how machine-made snow makes ski racing faster and riskier]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/science/olympians-and-scientists-explain-how-machine-made-snow-makes-ski-racing-faster-and-riskier</link>
            <description><![CDATA[U.S. Olympic skiers and scientists explain the sharp differences between natural snow and machine-made snow, from the science to the rising risk of crashes.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 15:13:29 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/science/olympians-and-scientists-explain-how-machine-made-snow-makes-ski-racing-faster-and-riskier</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/2026-winter-olympics"><![CDATA[2026 winter olympics]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/skiing"><![CDATA[skiing]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/snow"><![CDATA[snow]]></category>

                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Agnes Macy, The Conversation]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-07T122120Z_955796503_UP1EM270YBIBV_RTRMADP_3_OLYMPICS-2026-CROSSCOUNTRY-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Gaza's Rafah border crossing has reopened but few are allowed through]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/gazas-rafah-border-crossing-has-reopened-but-few-are-allowed-through</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Far fewer people than expected have crossed the Rafah border crossing due to disagreements, delays and restrictions negotiated by Israeli, Egyptian, Palestinian and international officials.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 14:45:06 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/gazas-rafah-border-crossing-has-reopened-but-few-are-allowed-through</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/gaza"><![CDATA[Gaza]]></category>

                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/israel-hamas-war"><![CDATA[Israel-Hamas war]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/rafah-border"><![CDATA[Rafah border]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Wafaa Shurafa, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Adam Geller, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Noha Elhennawy, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-04T111631Z_1951999206_RC2SEJAKPOGC_RTRMADP_3_ISRAEL-PALESTINIANS-EGYPT-RAFAH-1024x768.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="768" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Drone attack by paramilitary group in Sudan kills 24, including 8 children]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/drone-attack-by-paramilitary-group-in-sudan-kills-24-including-8-children</link>
            <description><![CDATA[A drone attack by a notorious paramilitary group hit a vehicle carrying displaced families in central Sudan on Saturday, killing at least 24 people, including 8 children, a doctors' group said.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 13:51:46 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/drone-attack-by-paramilitary-group-in-sudan-kills-24-including-8-children</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/crisis-in-sudan"><![CDATA[crisis in sudan]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/sudan"><![CDATA[sudan]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/sudan-civil-war"><![CDATA[Sudan civil war]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Samy Magdy, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-01-13T113814Z_2046658590_RC2QZIAPHEAJ_RTRMADP_3_SUDAN-POLITICS-ELOBEID-DISPLACED-1024x668.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="668" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Trump to hold first Board of Peace meeting this month in Washington]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/trump-to-hold-first-board-of-peace-meeting-this-month-in-washington</link>
            <description><![CDATA[President Donald Trump plans to convene the first meeting of his Board of Peace this month in Washington to raise money for the reconstruction of Gaza.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 12:55:40 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/trump-to-hold-first-board-of-peace-meeting-this-month-in-washington</guid>

                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/israel-hamas-war"><![CDATA[Israel-Hamas war]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Matthew Lee, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>

                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Four dead and three receive liver transplants after eating death cap mushrooms in California]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/health/four-dead-and-three-receive-liver-transplants-after-eating-death-cap-mushrooms-in-california</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Four people have died and three others have required liver transplants after eating the aptly named death cap mushroom that is proliferating in California following a rainy winter.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 12:16:50 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/health/four-dead-and-three-receive-liver-transplants-after-eating-death-cap-mushrooms-in-california</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/california"><![CDATA[california]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/mushrooms"><![CDATA[mushrooms]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/poisoning"><![CDATA[poisoning]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Julie Watson, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/Gr%C3%BCner_Knollenbl%C3%A4tterpilz_Amanita_phalloides-1024x657.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="657" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[U.S. gave Ukraine and Russia a June deadline to reach a peace deal, Zelenskyy says]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/u-s-gave-ukraine-and-russia-a-june-deadline-to-reach-a-peace-deal-zelenskyy-says</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The U.S. has given Ukraine and Russia a June deadline to reach a deal to end the nearly four‑year war.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 07 Feb 2026 11:51:57 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/u-s-gave-ukraine-and-russia-a-june-deadline-to-reach-a-peace-deal-zelenskyy-says</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/peace-deal"><![CDATA[peace deal]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/russia"><![CDATA[russia]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/trump-administration"><![CDATA[Trump Administration]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/ukraine"><![CDATA[Ukraine]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/ukraine-war"><![CDATA[Ukraine war]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Samya Kullab, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/2026-02-05T140425Z_1907866824_RC2NFJAV45GQ_RTRMADP_3_UKRAINE-CRISIS-ZELENSKIY-TUSK-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[How sports betting is changing our brains and behavior]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/video/horizons/2026/02/how-sports-betting-is-changing-our-brains-and-behavior</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Americans are expected to place a record-breaking $1.7 billion in legal bets on the Super Bowl. With a potential casino inside every phone and computer, a rising chorus of experts who study problem gambling and addiction are ringing the alarm. Horizons moderator William Brangham explores this tidal shift in American culture with journalist Danny Funt and addiction psychiatrist Dr. Timothy Fong.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 06 Feb 2026 19:00:57 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/video/horizons/2026/02/how-sports-betting-is-changing-our-brains-and-behavior</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/video/horizons"><![CDATA[Horizons]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[William Brangham]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Claire Mufson]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Madison Staten]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Satvi Sunkara]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Juliet Fuisz]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Alexa Gold]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Zoie Lambert]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/Horizons-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[U.S. births dropped last year, suggesting the 2024 uptick was short-lived]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/health/u-s-births-dropped-last-year-suggesting-the-2024-uptick-was-short-lived</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Experts say people are marrying later and also worry about their ability to have the money, health insurance and other resources needed to raise children in a stable environment.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 06 Feb 2026 18:56:12 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/health/u-s-births-dropped-last-year-suggesting-the-2024-uptick-was-short-lived</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/birth-rate"><![CDATA[birth rate]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/centers-for-disease-control-and-prevention"><![CDATA[centers for disease control and prevention]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/data"><![CDATA[data]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Mike Stobbe, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2019/05/2011-10-31T120000Z_1814590834_GM1E7B10K2B01_RTRMADP_3_POPULATION-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[U.S. restarts nuclear diplomacy with Iran amid escalating threats. Here's what to know]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/u-s-restarts-nuclear-diplomacy-with-iran-amid-escalating-threats-heres-what-to-know</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The U.S. faced two very different nuclear challenges across two continents Friday. For the first time since last year's war with Iran, U.S. and Iranian diplomats restarted indirect talks over Tehran's nuclear program. And for the first time, the U.S. accused China of conducting a secret nuclear test, just one day after letting a key nuclear arms treaty with Russia expire. Nick Schifrin reports.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 06 Feb 2026 18:55:03 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/u-s-restarts-nuclear-diplomacy-with-iran-amid-escalating-threats-heres-what-to-know</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran"><![CDATA[Iran]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran-nuclear-program"><![CDATA[iran nuclear program]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/nuclear-talks"><![CDATA[Nuclear Talks]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Nick Schifrin]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Dan Sagalyn]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Zeba Warsi]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/NuclearTalks-1024x616.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="616" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[News Wrap: Trump's racist social media post about the Obamas draws backlash]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/news-wrap-trumps-racist-social-media-post-about-the-obamas-draws-backlash</link>
            <description><![CDATA[In our news wrap Friday, the White House defended and then removed a racist depiction of the Obamas from Trump's social media, the U.S. arrested a key suspect in the 2012 Benghazi attack, a bomb blast killed Shiite worshippers at a mosque in Pakistan's capital, authorities are investigating the authenticity of a "new message" about Nancy Guthrie, and Hall of Fame quarterback Sonny Jurgensen died.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 06 Feb 2026 18:50:51 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/news-wrap-trumps-racist-social-media-post-about-the-obamas-draws-backlash</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/news-wrap"><![CDATA[news wrap]]></category>
                                                            <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/NewsWrap-5-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[One-on-one with Ambassador Huckabee on what's next for Gaza and the Middle East]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/one-on-one-with-ambassador-huckabee-on-whats-next-for-gaza-and-the-middle-east</link>
            <description><![CDATA[As the Trump administration advances its vision for rebuilding Gaza and reshaping how the territory is governed, critical issues remain unresolved as the ceasefire moves into its next phase. Geoff Bennett speaks with Mike Huckabee, U.S. ambassador to Israel, for more about the administration's plans.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 06 Feb 2026 18:45:31 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/one-on-one-with-ambassador-huckabee-on-whats-next-for-gaza-and-the-middle-east</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/gaza"><![CDATA[Gaza]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/israel"><![CDATA[Israel]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/israel-hamas-war"><![CDATA[Israel-Hamas war]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/mike-huckabee"><![CDATA[Mike Huckabee]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Geoff Bennett]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/02/OneOnOne-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[How effective will TrumpRX be at lowering prescription drug prices for Americans?]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/how-effective-will-trumprx-be-at-lowering-prescription-drug-prices-for-americans</link>
            <description><![CDATA[TrumpRX is now online. The new website lists drugs at reduced rates, with coupon codes to be used at participating pharmacies or directly through manufacturers' sites. It's part of Trump's pledge to lower prescription drug prices, but health policy experts caution the impact will likely be muted for many Americans. Stephanie Sy speaks with Washington Post reporter Dan Diamond for more.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 06 Feb 2026 18:40:57 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/how-effective-will-trumprx-be-at-lowering-prescription-drug-prices-for-americans</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/donald-trump"><![CDATA[Donald Trump news]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/drug-prices"><![CDATA[drug prices]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/prescription-drug-prices"><![CDATA[prescription drug prices]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/prescription-drugs"><![CDATA[prescription drugs]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/trumprx"><![CDATA[trumprx]]></category>

                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Trump administration's visa freeze upends work and life for many U.S. families]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/trump-administrations-visa-freeze-upends-work-and-life-for-many-u-s-families</link>
            <description><![CDATA[This week, the Trump administration was sued for a sweeping pause of immigrant visa processing for people from 75 countries. The freeze, which began last month, comes on top of full or partial travel and visa restrictions on citizens from 39 countries. We hear from some of the people left in limbo by the bans and suspensions, and Liz Landers speaks with David Bier at the Cato Institute for more.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 06 Feb 2026 18:35:52 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/trump-administrations-visa-freeze-upends-work-and-life-for-many-u-s-families</guid>

                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Maea Lenei Buhre]]></dc:creator>

                    </item>

            <description><![CDATA[Kimberly Atkins Stohr of The Boston Globe and Kathleen Parker of The Washington Post join Geoff Bennett to discuss the week in politics, including the fallout from President Trump's call to "nationalize" elections and his immigration crackdown.]]></description>

            <title><![CDATA[Christine Brennan discusses the Winter Olympics athletes to watch on 'Settle In']]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/christine-brennan-discusses-the-winter-olympics-athletes-to-watch-on-settle-in</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The 2026 Winter Olympics are now officially underway. This week's episode of our podcast "Settle In" is all about the games in Milan and Cortina, and what you need to know. Amna Nawaz speaks with sports journalist Christine Brennan of USA Today for more on the games, the athletes and the world coming together in an uncertain era.]]></description>
